# Shape Rotator OS

> Public web surface for the Shape Rotator cohort and workspace.

Important pages:

- [Workspace](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/workspace): immersive Shape Rotator control-room surface.
- [Workspace journal](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/workspace/journal): public field notes and AI/LLM mechanism essays.
- [Cohort](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/cohort): public cohort viewer.
- [Calendar](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/calendar): public program calendar.
- [Links](https://os-web.shaperotator.xyz/links): important project links.

Journal themes:

- LLM agents
- AI workflow memory
- human-in-the-loop AI
- Model Context Protocol
- AI trust and verification
- trusted execution environments
- agentic workspaces
- creative AI tools

Source context:

The workspace journal is designed as the public canon for selected notes from source streams such as the Shape Rotator Router profile at `https://shaperotator.teleport.computer/profile?handle=whimsy`, plus manual artifacts, GitHub work, and local creative experiments.
